title: IBM Recognizer Options
description: IBM Watson Speech-to-Text specific options. Only applies when recognizer vendor is 'ibm'.

sttApiKey.description: IBM STT API key. Overrides credentials configured in jambonz.

languageCustomizationId.description: ID of a custom language model.

acousticCustomizationId.description: ID of a custom acoustic model.

watsonMetadata.description: Customer ID metadata for data labeling.

watsonLearningOptOut.description: Opt out of IBM data collection for service improvements.
